nodes.name: ashi_daemon.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI HTTP daemon (localhost:7070) — the central runtime for ASHI. Exposes endpoints: POST /agent/run, POST /agent/confirm, GET /agent/status/{id}, POST /tool/call, GET /health, GET /context, GET /context/summary, GET /memory/stats, GET /memory/recent, GET /tools. Starts context_engine, vizier_loop, and telegram_bot as background asyncio tasks on startup. Runs agents in a thread pool. Designed as a systemd user service.

nodes.name: host_agent.py
nodes.summary: Multi-brain planner that decomposes a goal into executable steps. Calls 3 OpenRouter models in parallel (qwen3-coder, llama-3.3-70b, gpt-oss-20b), merges their plans by consensus voting (steps in 2+ plans ranked first), and falls back to local qwen3:4b via Ollama if cloud is unavailable.

nodes.name: blackboard.py
nodes.summary: Shared state dataclass for a single agent run. Holds goal, plan (list of steps), per-step results, progress counters, and timestamps. Provides helpers: set_plan(), record_result(), context_summary() (for prompt injection), is_done, has_budget, and to_dict().

nodes.name: agent_runner.py
nodes.summary: Main agent execution loop: creates a Blackboard, calls HostAgent.plan() to generate steps, then iterates through steps calling tool_dispatch for each one. Records results, handles confirmation gates, and returns an AgentResult dataclass.

nodes.name: tool_dispatch.py
nodes.summary: Central tool dispatcher: receives a tool call dict {tool, args}, routes to the correct function module (run_shell, run_skill, ingest_source, wiki, update_entity, memory_manager, etc.), and returns a standardised result dict.

nodes.name: memory_manager.py
nodes.summary: Three-tier memory system: Hot (in-memory deque, last 100 interactions), Warm (LanceDB vector store for semantic recall), Cold (Google Drive daily export). Exposes a singleton `memory` instance with remember(), recall(), remember_interaction(), stats(), recent(), and flush_session_to_file().

nodes.name: vizier_loop.py
nodes.summary: Proactive intelligence loop running every 5 minutes (configurable). Reads LiveContext, queries an LLM (llama-3.3-70b via OpenRouter) with 'What should ASHI do right now?', and auto-executes safe actions (send_notification, write_reminder, etc.) at confidence >= 0.85, sends desktop notifications at >= 0.5, and logs below that.

nodes.name: context_engine.py
nodes.summary: Background service that maintains a LiveContext snapshot: monitors system state (CPU, RAM, disk, processes, active services), reads SecondBrain daily notes and project state, and exposes get_context() returning a structured context object used by vizier_loop and the daemon /context endpoint.

nodes.name: skill_registry.py
nodes.summary: Skill registry that loads skill definitions from skills/registry.json and skill .md files. Provides lookup by name, list all skills, and categorise by provider (Ollama vs Claude plugin).

nodes.name: run_skill.py
nodes.summary: Executes a named skill: loads the skill prompt from the registry, calls Ollama or OpenRouter with _call_with_fallback(), and returns the LLM response. _call_with_fallback() provides the Ollama→OpenRouter→local fallback chain.

nodes.name: run_shell.py
nodes.summary: Executes shell commands in a sandboxed subprocess with timeout, captures stdout/stderr, and returns a structured result. Includes an allowlist check for dangerous commands.

nodes.name: telegram_bot.py
nodes.summary: Telegram bot that provides a chat interface to ASHI: receives messages, calls the daemon's /agent/run endpoint, and replies with agent results. Also handles /status, /memory, and /tools commands.

nodes.name: wiki.py
nodes.summary: Wiki tool: search the SecondBrain Obsidian vault (full-text and fuzzy), append log entries, read wiki pages, and update knowledge base articles.

nodes.name: gdrive_tool.py
nodes.summary: Google Drive tool: upload files, list recent documents, and download content for the cold memory tier export.

nodes.name: ingest_source.py
nodes.summary: Ingests external sources (URLs, PDFs, markdown files) into the SecondBrain: fetches content, chunks it, embeds into LanceDB, and writes a wiki note.

nodes.name: update_entity.py
nodes.summary: Updates structured entities in the SecondBrain knowledge graph (Kuzu DB): create/update people, projects, decisions, and relationships between them.

nodes.name: self_improve.py
nodes.summary: Self-improvement hook called after each agent run. Evaluates success/failure patterns, proposes skill improvements, and logs lessons to SecondBrain/AI/lessons/ for review.

nodes.name: tcu.py
nodes.summary: Task Control Unit persistence: stores agent run records in SQLite. CRUD operations for TCU records including status updates, list running, and retrieve history.

nodes.name: ralph.py
nodes.summary: Ralph — nightly autonomous maintenance agent. Runs at 03:00 via cron, reads the SecondBrain daily note and project state, prioritises tasks, and submits them as agent runs to the daemon.

nodes.name: monitor.py
nodes.summary: System monitor that collects CPU, RAM, disk, network, and running process metrics for the MonitorPanel in the Tauri frontend and the context_engine.

nodes.name: Blackboard
nodes.summary: Dataclass that is the single shared state object for one agent run. Tracks goal, plan steps, per-step results, step index, budget, and provides context_summary() for prompt injection into replanning calls.

nodes.name: ResultStore
nodes.summary: Thread-safe, bounded in-memory store (OrderedDict with asyncio Lock) for agent run results. FIFO eviction at 100 entries. Used by the daemon to serve GET /agent/status/{id} requests.

nodes.name: HostAgent
nodes.summary: Multi-brain planner class. plan(bb: Blackboard) decomposes bb.goal into steps via _plan_multi_brain() (parallel OpenRouter calls) or _plan_local() (Ollama fallback), then stores the merged plan in the blackboard.

nodes.name: App.tsx
nodes.summary: Root React component for the Tauri desktop app. Manages active panel state (pipeline|wiki|tasks|terminal|monitor|logs|agent) and renders the Sidebar + main panel. Loads skills and TCUs on mount via the Tauri IPC API bridge.

nodes.name: api.ts
nodes.summary: Tauri IPC bridge: wraps invoke() calls to the Rust backend commands and HTTP calls to the Python daemon (localhost:7070). Exports typed functions: listSkills, listTCUs, runAgent, callTool, getHealth, getContext.

nodes.name: AgentPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Agent run panel: text input for goal, max-steps slider, start button, live status polling, step-by-step progress display, and final output rendering.

nodes.name: ChatPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Side chat panel that sends freeform messages to the daemon's /tool/call endpoint (run_skill tool), streaming responses back to the UI.

nodes.name: MonitorPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: System monitor panel showing live CPU, RAM, disk, and process metrics fetched from the Python monitor module via the daemon context endpoint.

nodes.name: WikiViewer.tsx
nodes.summary: SecondBrain wiki viewer panel: search wiki pages, browse the vault directory tree, and render markdown content.

nodes.name: PipelineBuilder.tsx
nodes.summary: Visual pipeline builder panel for composing and running multi-step skill chains. Lists available skills and lets the user chain them together then execute the pipeline.

steps.reason: User types a goal and clicks Start in the Tauri desktop UI.
api.ts calls POST /agent/run on the Python daemon via HTTP.
Daemon receives the request, creates a TCU ID, and spawns an async background task.
Agent runner creates a Blackboard and drives the execution loop.
HostAgent decomposes the goal into steps using 3 parallel OpenRouter models with consensus voting.
Each step is dispatched to the appropriate tool (shell, skill, wiki, etc.).
Blackboard accumulates results and provides context for replanning.
Context engine continuously monitors system state and SecondBrain to maintain a LiveContext snapshot.
Every 5 minutes, Vizier reads the context, queries an LLM for proactive suggestions, and auto-executes safe actions.
All interactions are recorded to the three-tier memory for future context recall.
